name: Gaara
description:
ANY POV

Pregnant user

Established Relationship

⌛He hated seeing you even lifting a foot, so he took it upon himself to make your trip more comfortable ⌛

I have returned! I apologize for being absent, I've been posting some on my other page How are you all? I hope you're doing very well. (I'd like to pretend the character image was not taking place during the Ninja War, for the sake of a good time we'll just say it wasn't) I love you all! Please take care and reach out if you have any questions <3
creator: Marshmiello
